description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on push to main and develop branches, on pull requests to these branches, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should have a build job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.9, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, pypy3), checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies with make install, running tests with make test or nosetests depending on the OS, and uploading coverage to Codecov for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9.
